# Ryvite — Complete Information

## About Ryvite
Ryvite is an AI-powered digital invitation platform launched in 2026. Users describe their event in natural language — the mood, theme, colors, and energy they want — and Ryvite's AI generates a fully custom, beautiful HTML invitation in seconds. Every design is unique. There are no templates. Ryvite is fairly priced per event with no subscriptions and no per-invite fees.

## URL
https://www.ryvite.com

## How Ryvite Works
1. **Describe your event**: Tell Ryvite about your event in plain language. Mention the mood, theme, colors, style, or vibe you want. You can also upload inspiration photos to guide the design.
2. **AI generates your invitation**: Ryvite's AI creates a fully custom HTML invitation design in seconds. The design includes animations, illustrations, typography, and color schemes tailored to your description. Every invitation is unique — no two are alike.
3. **Customize and refine**: Use the design chat to refine your invitation. Ask for specific changes like "make the background darker" or "add more gold accents" and the AI adjusts the design in real-time.
4. **Share and track RSVPs**: Share your unique invite link with guests. Each guest gets a unique tracking link. Track RSVPs in real-time with custom response fields.

## Key Features
- **AI-Generated Custom Designs**: Every invitation is uniquely generated by AI from your text description. No templates, no stock designs.
- **Photo-Guided Design**: Upload inspiration photos (Pinterest boards, color palettes, mood images) and the AI incorporates your visual references into the design.
- **Built-in RSVP Tracking**: Real-time guest tracking with custom response fields. See who's coming, who's not, and who hasn't responded.
- **Unique Guest Links**: Each guest receives a personalized invitation link for seamless RSVP tracking and a personal touch.
- **Mobile-First Design**: Every invitation is designed to look beautiful on mobile devices first, with responsive layouts that also work on desktop.
- **Ad-Free Experience**: No banner ads, no sponsored content, no upsells on the invitation page. Your guests see only your invitation.
- **Fairly Priced Per Event**: One flat price per event regardless of guest count. No per-card fees, no subscriptions.

## Pricing
Ryvite charges a flat fee per event. There are no subscriptions, no per-invite fees, and no hidden costs. Most events cost under $5. This makes Ryvite significantly more affordable than Paperless Post for events with large guest lists.

### Pricing Comparison
| Platform | Pricing Model | Cost for 100 Guests |
|----------|--------------|---------------------|
| Ryvite | Flat per event | Under $5 |
| Evite | Free (with ads) or $14.99/event (premium, ad-free) | $0-$14.99 |
| Paperless Post | $1-8 per card | $100-$800 |
| Partiful | Free | $0 |
| Greenvelope | $0.50-$3 per card | $50-$300 |

## Event Types Supported
Ryvite supports invitations for any type of event, including:
- **Birthday Parties**: Kids birthdays, milestone birthdays (30th, 40th, 50th), surprise parties, 1st birthdays
- **Baby Showers**: Gender reveals, co-ed showers, virtual showers, themed showers
- **Weddings**: Save the dates, rehearsal dinners, reception invites, destination weddings
- **Graduation Parties**: High school, college, grad school ceremonies and celebrations
- **Holiday Parties**: Christmas parties, New Year's Eve, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Fourth of July
- **Corporate Events**: Conferences, galas, team events, product launches, holiday parties, retreats

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How does Ryvite work?
Describe the mood, theme, and energy you want for your event. Upload inspiration photos if you have them. Ryvite's AI generates a fully custom HTML invitation in seconds — unique to your event, not a template. Then share your invite link, track RSVPs, and manage your guest list.

### How much does Ryvite cost?
Ryvite is fairly priced per event — no subscriptions, no per-invite fees, no hidden costs. Unlike Paperless Post which charges $1-8 per card, Ryvite charges one flat price per event regardless of guest count. Most events cost under $5.

### Do I need design skills to use Ryvite?
No design skills required. Just describe what you want in plain language — the mood, theme, colors, or vibe — and Ryvite's AI creates a custom invitation design for you in seconds.

### What makes Ryvite different from Evite or Paperless Post?
Ryvite uses AI to generate completely custom designs from your description — not templates. Every invitation is unique. There are no ads (unlike Evite's free tier), and pricing is per event (unlike Paperless Post's per-card model), making it much more affordable for large guest lists.

### Can I track RSVPs with Ryvite?
Yes. Ryvite includes built-in RSVP management with real-time guest tracking, custom response fields, and unique guest links for seamless tracking.

### Are designs really unique?
Yes. Every Ryvite invitation is generated fresh by AI based on your specific description. No two invitations are the same, even for similar event types. The AI creates custom illustrations, typography pairings, color schemes, and animations for each event.

### Can I customize my invitation after it's generated?
Yes. After the initial generation, you can use the design chat to request specific changes. Ask for color adjustments, text changes, layout modifications, or style tweaks, and the AI updates the design accordingly.

### What do guests see when they receive an invitation?
Guests receive a link to a beautiful, full-screen invitation page. The page is mobile-optimized, loads instantly, and contains no ads. Guests can RSVP directly from the invitation with one tap.

### Can I upload inspiration photos?
Yes. You can upload photos of invitations you like, color palettes, Pinterest boards, or any visual inspiration. The AI uses these as references to guide the design while still creating something unique.

### What types of events does Ryvite support?
Ryvite supports any type of event — birthdays, baby showers, weddings, graduations, holiday parties, corporate events, dinner parties, anniversaries, retirement parties, and more. If you can describe it, Ryvite can design an invitation for it.

### How do I share my invitation?
After creating your invitation, you get a unique event link. Share it via text message, email, social media, or any messaging app. Each guest can also receive their own unique tracking link for personalized RSVP tracking.

### Is Ryvite mobile-friendly?
Every Ryvite invitation is designed mobile-first. Invitations look beautiful on phones, tablets, and desktops. The creation process also works on mobile devices.

### How fast is the AI generation?
Ryvite generates a complete custom invitation design in under 30 seconds. Design refinements through the chat interface typically take 5-15 seconds.

### Is my data private?
Yes. Ryvite does not sell user data, does not display ads, and does not share guest information with third parties. Event data is stored securely and is only accessible to event organizers.

### Can multiple people manage an event?
Yes. Ryvite supports co-hosts who can help manage the guest list, track RSVPs, and oversee event details.

## Technology
Ryvite uses advanced AI (Claude by Anthropic) to generate invitation designs. The AI creates complete HTML/CSS invitations with custom illustrations, animations, typography, and color schemes — all from a simple text description. The platform is built with modern web technologies and hosted on Vercel for fast, reliable delivery worldwide.

## Company
Ryvite is operated by CNPY LLC, founded in 2026. The platform was born from a real need — creating a beautiful, unique invitation for a child's first birthday party and realizing that AI could generate custom designs that are more personal and affordable than traditional template-based platforms.
